title: Perform queen bee artificial insemination
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform queen bee artificial insemination demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine breeding method

pcs.text: Review options for artificial breeding to determine the most suitable and affordable method in line with breeding objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review options for artificial breeding to determine the most suitable and affordable method in line with breeding objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review options for artificial breeding to determine the most suitable and affordable method in line with breeding objectives.

pcs.text: Select an artificial breeding option according to workplace breeding program and queen and drone management program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select an artificial breeding option according to workplace breeding program and queen and drone management program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select an artificial breeding option according to workplace breeding program and queen and drone management program.

pcs.text: Identify, source and arrange resource requirements for breeding program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, source and arrange resource requirements for breeding program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, source and arrange resource requirements for breeding program.

pcs.text: Prepare program schedules based on available resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare program schedules based on available resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare program schedules based on available resources.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and hygiene practices, assess risks and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and hygiene practices, assess risks and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and hygiene practices, assess risks and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fitted and used personal protective equipment during insemination process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fitted and used personal protective equipment during insemination process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fitted and used personal protective equipment during insemination process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine breeding method

elements.title: Implement breeding method

pcs.text: Obtain genetic material ensuring its health, reliability and legitimacy according to required bee characteristics and breeding objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain genetic material ensuring its health, reliability and legitimacy according to required bee characteristics and breeding objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain genetic material ensuring its health, reliability and legitimacy according to required bee characteristics and breeding objectives.

pcs.text: Receive, check and store genetic material to ensure maximum viability for program outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Receive, check and store genetic material to ensure maximum viability for program outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Receive, check and store genetic material to ensure maximum viability for program outcomes.

pcs.text: Manage rearing times to ensure age and condition of breeding bees occurs according to schedule
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage rearing times to ensure age and condition of breeding bees occurs according to schedule?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage rearing times to ensure age and condition of breeding bees occurs according to schedule.

pcs.text: Collect semen from drones according to workplace hygiene and collection procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect semen from drones according to workplace hygiene and collection procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect semen from drones according to workplace hygiene and collection procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare queen and inseminate ensuring minimal risk of contamination according to workplace protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare queen and inseminate ensuring minimal risk of contamination according to workplace protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare queen and inseminate ensuring minimal risk of contamination according to workplace protocols.

pcs.text: Place queen in a colony of suitable strength and monitor colony development and health according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place queen in a colony of suitable strength and monitor colony development and health according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place queen in a colony of suitable strength and monitor colony development and health according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement breeding method

elements.title: Monitor and maintain program

pcs.text: Review genetic material transfer and management practices to inform future breeding programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review genetic material transfer and management practices to inform future breeding programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review genetic material transfer and management practices to inform future breeding programs.

pcs.text: Document performance data in progeny resulting from genetic material transfer programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document performance data in progeny resulting from genetic material transfer programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document performance data in progeny resulting from genetic material transfer programs.

pcs.text: Calculate and use success rates from breeding objectives to determine success of artificial insemination program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and use success rates from breeding objectives to determine success of artificial insemination program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and use success rates from breeding objectives to determine success of artificial insemination program.

pcs.text: Identify and record modifications to queen and drone management program to assist continuous improvement processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record modifications to queen and drone management program to assist continuous improvement processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record modifications to queen and drone management program to assist continuous improvement processes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor and maintain program
